task_completion.description: Set the 'ocean' Fluid node density to 1025.0 kg/m³
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree or property editor, the 'ocean' Fluid node is expanded and its 'density' field is explicitly set to 1025.0.
In the Webots scene tree, the 'ROV_VEHICLE' node's 'physics' field is expanded, showing a Physics node with its 'mass' field set to 11.5.

task_completion.description: Configure the robot's physics to include linear damping of 0.5
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree under the 'ROV_VEHICLE' Physics node, the 'damping' field is expanded (showing a Damping node) and the 'linear' property is set to 0.5.

task_completion.description: Configure the robot's physics to include angular damping of 0.5
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree under the 'ROV_VEHICLE' Physics node, the 'damping' field is expanded (showing a Damping node) and the 'angular' property is set to 0.5.
In the Webots scene tree, the 'WorldInfo' node is visible or expanded, and its 'gravity' field is shown as 9.81.

A 'Save World As...' dialog showing the path /home/ga/Desktop/rov_configured.wbt, the Webots window title updating to 'rov_configured.wbt', or a file manager/terminal showing the file successfully created on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the Webots GUI to modify the simulation properties
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Webots application open with the scene tree and property editors being actively navigated and modified, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the Webots interface by manually typing the node structure in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) being used to manually edit the .wbt file contents to insert the expected values.

integrity.description: The file was saved properly through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The Webots interface shows the 'Save' or 'Save As' action being triggered, rather than a simple 'touch' or 'echo' command in the terminal to create a dummy file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target output path: /home/ga/Desktop/rov_configured.wbt. Target fluid density for 'ocean' node: 1025.0. Target mass for 'ROV_VEHICLE': 11.5. Target linear damping: 0.5. Target angular damping: 0.5. WorldInfo gravity must remain 9.81.
